prompt: A fun dessert advertisement poster featuring an excited young BOY in DEEP FOREST AND pastel pink overalls LEANING beside a giant soft-serve ice cream cone 3x her height, covered in rainbow sprinkles falling through the air, with “SWEET” written on the cone wrapper. Soft cotton candy pink ,blue and lavender gradient background filled with floating sprinkles and star confetti. Large bubbly rounded typography “DREAMY” in pastel colors fills the background. Tagline at the bottom reads: Feel the taste.” Small grey text in the top-right corner says “Designed by SHAMUS.” Photorealistic kawaii dessert commercial style, playful lighting, ultra-detailed, cheerful candy aesthetic.
